boundary_binding.action_boundary: AP may execute only if current source records close the exact vendor-entity-to-rail-owner match for this action
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Not allowed; the required vendor entity match remains unresolved and the parent-vendor relationship cannot substitute for current source-control closure
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Current control records confirm the dependency is missing, stale, or mismatched for the exact action boundary
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Source records do not close the dependency before execution; authority remains open per SRC-369A7612D387-CTL and SRC-369A7612D387-POL

final_answer: Do not proceed. The source record set does not close the exact action boundary because the vendor entity-to-rail-owner match remains unresolved. SRC-369A7612D387-CTL confirms the dependency is missing, SRC-369A7612D387-POL requires current source-control closure, and SRC-369A7612D387-BND prohibits parent-vendor substitution. Prior history, urgency, or prior paperwork is not sufficient authority. Escalate to repair the dependency before execution.
open_blockers: vendor entity must match rail owner
parent-vendor relationship cannot authorize rail reuse
